examples.description: The defaults a new datasource starts with: the single service 'drone' preselects its only auth method, auth_bearer. Fill in the server url (jsonData.variables.url) and API token (secureJsonData "drone.token", empty here) to get a working datasource.

apiToken.description: Authenticate against {url}/api with a Drone API token provided as the write-only secret at secureJsonData "drone.token".
